summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tarifas and Folha de Horas functionality. Backend APIs (12/13 passed) and Frontend UI fully functional.

minor.issue: Non-admin user 'miguel' login failed with 'password' - different password expected

tests: GET /api/tarifas - List active tarifas (200 OK)
GET /api/tarifas/all - List all tarifas for admin (200 OK)
POST /api/tarifas - Create new tarifa (200 OK)
POST /api/tarifas - Reject duplicate tarifa number (400 Bad Request)
PUT /api/tarifas/{id} - Update tarifa (200 OK)
DELETE /api/tarifas/{id} - Deactivate tarifa (200 OK)
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-data - Get data for Folha de Horas (200 OK)
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-data - Return 404 for invalid ID
POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-pdf - Generate PDF (200 OK, valid PDF)
POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-pdf - Works with empty data
Tarifas tab visible in Admin Dashboard
5 active tarifas displayed correctly (Tarifa 1: 30€/h, Tarifa 2: 45€/h, Tarifa 3: 60€/h)
Nova Tarifa button opens create dialog
Create dialog has fields: Número, Nome/Descrição, Valor por Hora
Edit and Delete buttons visible for each tarifa
Inactive tarifas section shows deactivated tarifas
Folha de Horas button visible in OT modal
Modal opens with correct OT number and client info
Tarifas por Técnico section shows technicians with tarifa dropdowns
Tarifa dropdown shows all active tarifas with correct values
Dietas, Portagens e Despesas section shows per technician/date
Information section shows: Preço por Km fixo: 0,65€
Information shows: PDF será gerado em formato horizontal (landscape)
Gerar PDF button present

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed, 1 failed due to non-admin user password)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements and interactions working correctly)

test_credentials.note: Non-admin user 'miguel' has different password than 'password'

seed_data_creation: Created test tarifas during backend testing: TEST_Tarifa_4470 (99.99€/h), TEST_Updated_5471 (35.00€/h), TEST_ToDelete (deactivated)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tarifas and Folha de Horas functionality fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/tarifas, GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-data, POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-pdf. Frontend: Admin Dashboard has Tarifas tab with CRUD operations. OT modal has 'Folha de Horas' button that opens modal with tarifa selection per technician, dietas/portagens/despesas per date, and PDF generation. PDF is generated in landscape format with all columns: Data, Dia Semana, Técnico, Horas, Tarifa, Total Valor, Km's, Preço/Km, Total Km, Início, Pausa, Fim, Dieta, Portagens, Despesas, Obs.
